transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline for all three components, then prioritize the one with the highest expected headroom gain per unit effort. First subtask should focus on producing one improved feasible candidate for the most promising component while keeping the other two unchanged. If that candidate looks strong, use the remaining budget to either refine it or shift to the next-best component. Stop early if marginal gains appear small relative to time cost.
